name: Uluwatu - The Peak
notes: At high tide, aim south of the cave when coming in. Lower tide gets shallow and can close out.
description: Uluwatu - The Peak is the main peak directly in front of the Uluwatu cave. It is a reliable dry-season reef wave that works best on mid to high tide, producing powerful barrelling takeoffs and bowling left-hand walls over the coral platform. There can be short rights back toward the cliff, but the main wave is a left.
